input_preview: is the the right command to mount orion's (192.168.50.199)  directory to this directory on Aurora?:
output_preview:
No. `mount --bind` only binds a **local directory to another local directory**. It cannot mount `angelo@host:/path`.

Also, you said Orion is `192.168.50.199`, but the command uses `192.168.50.179`.
